name: Suspicious JavaScript Execution via Node or JScript
description: Detects node.js or JScript executing suspicious scripts from temporary paths
query:
// Detect JavaScript execution from suspicious locations
// Trigger on node/jscript from temp or downloads
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)(node|wscript|cscript)\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(\\temp\\|\\tmp\\|\\downloads\\).*\.(js|jse)$"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
